summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OzLight LED aquarium controller. All major functionality working correctly including backend APIs, demo mode, navigation, modes activation with AKTİF badge and fine-tune sliders, simulation controls, and device management.

design_issues.issue: YENİ ZAMANLAICI button selector needs verification - button exists but may use different text or selector

passed_tests: Backend APIs - All 10 endpoints working (presets, schedules, devices)
All 5 bottom navigation tabs (control, modes, aquarium, schedule, settings)
Modlar tab - Category switching between planted/viewing
Modlar tab - Mode activation shows AKTİF badge (mode-active-max_growth)
Modlar tab - Fine-tune sliders appear after activation (mode-tuning-max_growth)
Modlar tab - Mode deactivation removes badge and sliders
Kontrol tab - Sliders working with Radix UI components
Kontrol tab - Power on/off buttons functional
Simülasyon tab - BAŞLAT button working, changes to DURDUR when active
Ayarlar tab - Device info display (name, ID) and disconnect button
Toast notifications working for mode activation and power controls

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor selector issue in Zamanlama)
